name: fix-dti-script-paths
title: Fix broken script-path invocation in archive-planning and goal-meta-skill
description: archive-planning SKILL.md invokes the bundled script via bare $SKILL_DIR (unset at runtime -> broken path); goal-meta-skill uses a cwd-relative scripts/ path. Adopt the repo's <skill-dir> literal-substitution convention used by git-commit and the gh-* skills.
creator: lyh
